channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16778] sanity-quota test_75: @@@@@@ FAIL: write succeed, expect EDQUOT (3)
item.description:
This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/eacceaeb-e5ba-4b8d-969d-ac70d486e52a

test_75 failed with the following error:

write succeed, expect EDQUOT (3)

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/94194 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_7.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/94194 - 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

Disk quotas for usr 60000 (uid 60000):
     Filesystem  kbytes   quota   limit   grace   files   quota   limit   grace
    /mnt/lustre   29732*  10240   20480       -      10       0       0       -
lustre-MDT0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       1       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0001_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0002_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       0       -       0       -
lustre-MDT0003_UUID
                   9252       -   10192       -       9       -       0       -
lustre-OST0000_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0001_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -

                  20480*      -   20480       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0003_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -

                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0005_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0006_UUID
                      0       -       0       -       -       -       -       -
lustre-OST0007_UUID
                      0       -      48       -       -       -       -       -
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 20528
Files for user (60000), count=13:
  File: /mnt/lustre
  Size: 4096      	Blocks: 8          IO Block: 4096   directory
Device: 2c54f966h/743766374d	Inode: 144115188193296385  Links: 5
Access: (0755/drwxr-xr-x)  Uid: (60000/quota_usr)   Gid: (60000/quota_usr)

Device: 2c54f966h/743766374d	Inode: 144115473707958500  Links: 1

  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6597:error()

item.summary: sanity-quota test_75: @@@@@@ FAIL: write succeed, expect EDQUOT (3)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/51158/
Subject: LU-16778 tests: sanity-quota_75 fix
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: f12f98ade3ba31cec9f0c64324f7f6266707ba5f

"Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/51158
Subject: LU-16778 tests: sanity-quota_75 fix
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7fd997a97808b9a58a912cff27b75a480fe1a7fe
